title: lilium duchartrei var. farreri
intro: Lilium duchartrei var. farreri, also known as the Lilium farreri, is a type of lily plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Tibet and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in various forms of traditional medicine.
